summary: Iteration 3 - Phase 1 (Driver Exit Mgmt, Vehicle Disposal Mgmt, PeriodFilter, Clickable Dashboard Widgets, Print Export) tested end-to-end. Backend: 48/48 pytest assertions pass (100%), including the 19 new Phase 1 tests (TestDriverExit, TestVehicleDisposal, TestDrilldowns) plus all 27 prior tests. Frontend: All critical Phase 1 flows verified — dashboard cards open DrillDownDialog with correct titles; docs_expiring row click navigates to /vehicles/:id; Vehicles 'Include Sold/Scrapped' toggle filters correctly; vehicle disposal banner appears and Add buttons are hidden in tabs after sold; PeriodFilter present on /trips with This Month preset working; Reports Print button renders after Generate; driver resignation surfaces 'resigned' badge in list; /api/drivers/active excludes resigned drivers (backend test verified).
critical_code_review_comments: routes_drilldowns.py: All 9 endpoints correctly exclude sold/scrapped vehicles (verified by test_drilldowns_exclude_disposed_vehicles).

routes_core.py: Driver exit handler correctly auto-fills exit_date and unassigns vehicle on status=resigned/terminated; PUT on driver enforces management role for terminal statuses (verified by test_data_entry_cannot_set_resigned and test_terminate_requires_management).
routes_core.py: Vehicle disposal handler auto-fills disposal_date on status=sold/scrapped; data_entry blocked (403); delete blocked when history exists (verified).
DrillDownDialog.jsx: A11y warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' fires twice — non-blocking but should add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby for screen readers.
Dashboard.jsx: All metric cards properly wired (data-testid present and clickable) and pass exclude-disposed defaults.

VehicleProfile.jsx: disposal-banner correctly renders SOLD badge + Disposal Date + Sale Value + Buyer; Add buttons hidden in all tabs (Docs, Trips, Fuel, etc.) when vehicle is disposed — verified visually.
PeriodFilter mounted on /trips with data-testid='trips-period-filter' and option 'trips-period-option-this_month' present and functional.

Reports.jsx: Print button renders only after report generation — correct UX. window.print() integration not directly tested (print preview not accessible in headless) but button exists with proper data-testid.
test_credentials: No auth. localStorage 'fleet_role' or X-Role header (driver|data_entry|management|admin).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed vehicles/drivers/documents/trips and clean up via admin DELETE. Seeded vehicle 0e572cbb-d447-4107-a08b-e7c7f409c73b and Ramesh Kumar preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 is fully verified. test_fleet_backend.py now has 48 tests covering: roles, pagination, RBAC matrix (driver/data_entry/management/admin), repair approval, dashboard+trends, driver stats, fastag sync, reports+export, expense ledger, vehicle summary, Phase 1 driver exit (6 tests), Phase 1 vehicle disposal (5 tests), Phase 1 drilldowns (10 tests incl. disposed-exclusion). UI flows verified via Playwright: dashboard drilldowns (under_repair, docs_expiring with row→navigate, service_overdue, fuel_month, active_trips), Vehicles include-disposed toggle, drivers list+profile, trips PeriodFilter, reports Print button, vehicle disposal banner + readOnly tabs, driver resignation badge.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. Minor a11y warning on DialogContent (missing aria-describedby) is non-blocking and cosmetic; not flagged as a bug.
